ext_weather.shortForecast: Sunny then Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
ext_weather.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms after 5pm. Sunny, with a high near 102. Heat index values as high as 109. West wind 10 to 15 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
